positive: A highly detailed, aesthetically balanced graphic illustration featuring a stylized mythical creature, perhaps a griffin or a winged feline, rendered in a dynamic, majestic posture. The creature is set against a minimalist, abstract watercolor wash background in deep indigo and burnt orange tones. Focus on clean, sharp lines for the main silhouette, emphasizing tribal, geometric patterns etched onto the wings and musculature. The overall composition should be symmetrical and highly contrasting, suggesting power and mystery. Style: Japanese woodblock print meets contemporary linework illustration, high contrast black and white with selective spot colors. Studio lighting, perfect for apparel printing, vector quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, poor quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, poorly drawn, messy, grainy, disfigured
